title: I Bought a Slow Feeder Bowl. Here's What Actually Happened.
excerpt: I tried a slow feeder bowl for my golden retriever Gus. It helped with vomiting but cleaning it is annoying.
author: the guy who mopped kibble vomit

title: I Didn't Want a Pet Camera. Then I Got One for Free.
excerpt: My coworker gave me her old Furbo camera. Now I spend 20 minutes a day shooting treats at my dog remotely.
author: that guy who yelled at his dog through wifi

title: The Vet Said Gus Is Fat. I'm Still Processing.
excerpt: My golden retriever Gus weighs 82 pounds. The vet says he needs to lose weight. I have no idea if this will work.
author: the guy who overfed his golden

title: My Cat Is Fat. The Vet Wasn't Surprised.
excerpt: Dr. Patel said obese. I cried in the parking lot. Here's the year-long journey to get Mochi back to a healthy weight.
author: A person who cried in a vet parking lot and then fixed it

title: Raising Gus: Puppy Feeding Guide
excerpt: I got a puppy in 2022. July, I think. He's 4 now. Here's what I'd do differently.
author: An IT guy who got a puppy on impulse

title: Gus Got an Ear Infection and I Panicked for No Reason
excerpt: Gus woke me up scratching at 6 AM. It smelled sour. I panicked. It was yeast. Here's what I learned.
author: Someone who panicked at 6 AM over dog ear yeast
